segments.speaker: Agent
segments.text: Thanks for contacting support. Can I have the email on the account?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Sure. It's jongkuk dot yi at gmail dot com.

segments.speaker: Agent
segments.text: Thank you. How can I help today?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: My package says delivered, but I don't see it in the mailroom or at my door.

segments.speaker: Agent
segments.text: I'm sorry about that. Can you confirm the delivery address?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yes, it's 42 Beacon Street, apartment 3B, Boston.

segments.speaker: Agent
segments.text: The tracking shows it was left with the front desk.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: I checked there earlier, but I'll check again. If it's not there, what are the next steps?

segments.speaker: Agent
segments.text: We can open an investigation and contact the carrier.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: That would be helpful. I just moved, so I want to make sure the address format is correct.

segments.speaker: Agent
segments.text: The address looks correct on our end.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Great. Please go ahead and open the investigation.
